microgpt

Stata code for a workshop on active citizenship with a partner university from the UK. Uses data from the European Social Survey Round 1 (2002). Variable selection guided by  Hoskins and Mascherini, 'Measuring Active Citizenship through the Development of a Composite Indicator' (Social Indicators Research, 2008).
